tools.name: get_my_profile
tools.title: Get my profile
tools.description: Get the signed-in TRCN cooperative member's profile: name, email, phone, TRCN number, department, bank details.

tools.name: list_my_accounts
tools.title: List my accounts
tools.description: List all cooperative accounts (savings, shares, etc.) belonging to the signed-in member with current balances.

tools.name: list_my_loans
tools.title: List my loans
tools.description: List loans (special, trade, normal, long_term) for the signed-in member, including principal, outstanding balance, interest rate, repayment period, and status.

tools.name: list_my_transactions
tools.title: List my transactions
tools.description: List the signed-in member's recent transactions (deposits, withdrawals, repayments, etc.). Optionally set `limit` (1-100, default 25).

tools.name: list_my_special_contributions
tools.title: List my special contributions
tools.description: List the signed-in member's special contribution cycles with monthly amount, duration, contributed total, balance, year, and status.
